preToolUse.command: if [[ "{{command}}" != rtk* ]] && [[ "{{command}}" != squeezr* ]] && [[ "{{command}}" != npx\ rulesync* ]]; then echo '{"decision": "ask", "reason": "All shell commands should be prefixed with rtk for token optimization."}'; else echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi

if [[ "{{file_path}}" == .gemini/* ]] || [[ "{{file_path}}" == .rulesync/* ]] || [[ "{{file_path}}" == .serena/* ]]; then echo '{"decision": "ask", "reason": "Modifying infrastructure configuration files requires manual approval."}'; else echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi
